overview.name: Classgrid
overview.tagline: India's Most Advanced College ERP Platform
overview.description: Classgrid is a full-stack college management ERP designed for Indian universities. It replaces 10+ separate tools (attendance, fees, library, timetable, exams, chat, etc.) with one unified SaaS platform. Each college is an isolated "organization" (multi-tenant).

frontend.theme: OKLCH color system, dark mode support

backend.ai: Google Gemini API (AI quiz generation, summaries)

android.native_features: Google One Tap Sign-In (Credential Manager API), Biometric Auth (Fingerprint/Face), Push Notifications (Firebase Cloud Messaging), Camera/File Upload, Deep Linking, Haptic Vibration

android_apps.codebase: Single codebase using Gradle Build Flavors

app.name: Classgrid
app.role_lock: Can NEVER see faculty or admin login pages

app.name: Classgrid Faculty
app.role_lock: Can NEVER see student or admin login pages

app.name: Classgrid Admin
app.role_lock: Can NEVER see student or faculty login pages

android_apps.google_play_compliance: Native Google Sign-In (no WebView OAuth) = APPROVED, Back button intercepts React Router history = APPROVED, External links (Zoom/Meet/Razorpay) open in Chrome = APPROVED, Push Notifications + Biometrics = Native features = APPROVED, Privacy Policy on login page + settings = APPROVED

roles.role: Creates the organization, manages faculty, students, departments. Has god-mode access to everything within their org.
Manages classes, attendance, assignments, grades, quizzes. Can be HOD, Class Coordinator, Exam Controller etc.
Views attendance, submits assignments, takes quizzes, pays fees, accesses library, views timetable.

classgrid.folder_structure: classgrid_platform/ ├── .gitignore ├── README.md ├── info.xml (Shadcn/Stitch coding rules) ├── app.xml (THIS FILE — architecture reference) ├── license.md ├── package.json │ ├── client/ (React Frontend — Vite + Tailwind) │ ├── src/ │ │ ├── components/ (shadcn/ + features/ + ui/) │ │ ├── pages/ (All route pages) │ │ ├── contexts/ (Auth, Theme, Org contexts) │ │ ├── hooks/ (Custom React hooks) │ │ ├── lib/ (Supabase client, utils) │ │ └── styles/ (CSS modules) │ ├── public/ (Icons, manifest, favicon) │ ├── index.html │ ├── vite.config.js │ ├── tailwind.config.js │ └── package.json │ ├── server/ (Node.js + Express Backend) │ ├── src/ │ │ ├── routes/ (52+ API route files) │ │ ├── middleware/ (Auth, org isolation, rate limiting) │ │ └── utils/ (Helpers) │ ├── api/ │ ├── config/ │ ├── scripts/ │ ├── .env (Supabase keys, Razorpay, SMTP, etc.) │ ├── server.js │ └── package.json │ ├── android/ (Kotlin WebView — 3 Build Flavors) │ ├── app/ │ │ ├── google-services.json (Firebase — all 3 clients) │ │ ├── build.gradle.kts (Flavors: student/faculty/admin) │ │ └── src/main/ │ │ ├── java/com/classgrid/app/ │ │ │ ├── MainActivity.kt │ │ │ ├── GoogleSignInHelper.kt │ │ │ └── MyFirebaseMessagingService.kt │ │ ├── AndroidManifest.xml │ │ └── res/xml/network_security_config.xml │ ├── build.gradle.kts (Root — plugin versions) │ ├── settings.gradle.kts │ ├── ANDROID_FIREBASE_GUIDE.md │ └── ANDROID_BUILD_AND_PLAY_STORE_GUIDE.md │ ├── docs/ (14 planning/strategy documents) │ ├── CLASSGRID_ULTIMATE_PLAN.md │ ├── CLASSGRID_MASTER_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md │ ├── CLASSGRID_ULTIMATE_SAAS_PLAN.md │ ├── CLASSGRID_CANTEEN_PLAN.md │ └── ... (10 more) │ ├── supabase/sql/ (41 SQL migration files) │ ├── SUPABASE_CLASSROOM_MIGRATION.sql │ ├── SUPABASE_FEES_MIGRATION.sql │ └── ... (39 more) │ └── _archive/ (Old temporary scripts — safe to ignore)

modules.module: Profile, privacy policy, terms, theme toggle

design_rules.rule: Use ONLY shadcn components from client/src/components/shadcn/
Raw UI primitives in shadcn/, business components in features/
Never remove existing code unless explicitly asked
Make surgical edits only — do not refactor entire files
Follow the pipeline: Stitch → Figma → Shadcn → Backend
All pages must support dark mode via OKLCH color tokens
Desktop: Flexible redirects between login pages allowed
Mobile App: Role-locked, NO cross-role navigation ever
